common.timestamp.tsaSectigoDesc.en: Sectigo TSA Comodo Atomic Clock Server
common.timestamp.tsaSectigoDesc.zh: Comodo 安全原子钟授时服务

common.timestamp.tsaSslDesc.zh: 北美可信第三方权威授时节点

common.timestamp.tsaFreetsaDesc.zh: 开源高强密码学免费确权机构

common.timestamp.uploadDescription.en: Drag & drop PDF here. Fully supports encrypted PDFs with automated local decryption.
common.timestamp.uploadDescription.zh: 将 PDF 文件拖放到此处。支持所有标准和加密 PDF 的自动解密载入。

common.timestamp.tsaStepTitle.zh: 1. 选择受信任 TSA 服务器 (RFC 3161)

common.timestamp.tsaPrivacyHelp.en: Only SHA-256 hashes are sent to the TSA servers. Full document privacy guaranteed.
common.timestamp.tsaPrivacyHelp.zh: 系统只发送无规律的 SHA-256 哈希值与服务器交互，绝对保障文档隐私。

common.timestamp.processingDesc.en: Uploading hash streams. Generating authoritative RFC 3161 timestamps.
common.timestamp.processingDesc.zh: 上传文件并选择 TSA，点击“签署可信时间戳”生成由权威授时中心盖章的加密证书凭证。

common.timestamp.resultTitle.zh: 电子存证可信时间戳凭据

common.vectorExtractor.uploadLabel.zh: 上传需要提取矢量的 PDF 文件

common.vectorExtractor.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDFs with logos, diagrams, CAD drawings, or mathematical formulas. Rebuilds layers into high-fidelity SVGs.
common.vectorExtractor.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放带有徽标 Logo、插图、CAD 图表或复杂数学公式的 PDF。系统将把图层翻译为高保真 SVG 画布。

common.vectorExtractor.magnifierTitle.en: Hover to highlight vectors in 3D, click to select.
common.vectorExtractor.magnifierTitle.zh: 移动鼠标悬停以 3D 包围高亮元素，点击选择。

common.vectorExtractor.emptyPropertiesDe.en: Click any vector path, character, or shape to extract the code.
common.vectorExtractor.emptyPropertiesDe.zh: 点击左侧画布上的任何矢量线条、文字或色块进行高保真单独提取。

toolsPage.subtitle.en: {count}+ free, secure, and easy-to-use tools for all your PDF needs.
toolsPage.subtitle.zh: {count}+ 款免费、安全且易于使用的工具，满足您所有的 PDF 需求。

errors.pageErrorDescription.en: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.pageErrorDescription.zh: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

tools.mergePdf.uploadDescription.en: Drag and drop PDF files here, or click to browse. You can add multiple files.
tools.mergePdf.uploadDescription.zh: 拖放PDF文件到此处，或点击浏览。可以添加多个文件。

tools.mergePdf.reorderHint.en: Drag and drop to reorder files. Files will be merged in the order shown.
tools.mergePdf.reorderHint.zh: 拖放以重新排序文件。文件将按显示顺序合并。

tools.mergePdf.preserveBookmarks.en: Preserve bookmarks (create bookmark for each file)
tools.mergePdf.preserveBookmarks.zh: 保留书签（为每个文件创建书签）

tools.mergePdf.successMessage.en: PDFs merged successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.mergePdf.successMessage.zh: PDF合并成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.deletePages.selectHint.en: Click pages to select them for deletion, or enter page numbers/ranges above.
tools.deletePages.selectHint.zh: 点击页面选择删除，或在上方输入页码/范围。

tools.deletePages.warningText.en: Selected pages will be permanently removed from the PDF. At least one page must remain.
tools.deletePages.warningText.zh: 选中的页面将从PDF中永久删除。至少需要保留一页。

tools.deletePages.successMessage.en: Pages deleted successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.deletePages.successMessage.zh: 页面删除成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.extractPages.selectHint.en: Click pages to select them, or enter page numbers/ranges above.
tools.extractPages.selectHint.zh: 点击页面选择，或在上方输入页码/范围。

tools.extractPages.successMessage.en: Pages extracted successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.extractPages.successMessage.zh: 页面提取成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.posterizePdf.pageRangePlaceholder.zh: 例如：1-5, 8, 10-15（留空表示所有页面）

tools.posterizePdf.previewInfo.en: Each page will be split into {rows}×{cols} = {total} tiles.
tools.posterizePdf.previewInfo.zh: 每页将被分割为 {rows}×{cols} = {total} 个图块。

tools.posterizePdf.successMessage.en: PDF posterized successfully! Click the download button to save your file.
tools.posterizePdf.successMessage.zh: PDF海报化成功！点击下载按钮保存文件。

tools.digitalSign.warningExpired.en: Warning: Certificate is expired or not yet valid. Signing may still work but the signature will show as invalid.
tools.digitalSign.warningExpired.zh: 警告：证书已过期或尚未生效。签名可能仍然有效，但显示为无效。
